rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0010
rows.name: This is[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0020
rows.name: Hmm[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0025
rows.name: Elma-san, did you figure something out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0030
rows.name:
It appears to be a database containing
information related to Ancient Samaar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0035
rows.name: Ancient Samaar[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0036
rows.name:
Mo-mo! Tatsu is smelling the strong
scent of a massive discovery, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0040
rows.name: Give me a moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0050
rows.name:
I might be able to pull out
some useful information.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0060
rows.name: It's fragmented, but[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0070
rows.name: I'll share what I've found out for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0080
rows.name:
This entire area originally existed
within the rift between worlds,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0085
rows.name:
and it seems its purpose
was to seal Void away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0090
rows.name: And the structure we are in right now is[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0100
rows.name: a sealing mechanism built by Ancient Samaar[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0110
rows.name:
It appears to be a massive device designed
to suppress Void's power, so to speak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0115
rows.name:
So this tower really was
connected to Void after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0120
rows.name: It's currently in a dormant state, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0130
rows.name:
fortunately, the power
source is still active[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0135
rows.name: In that case[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0140
rows.name:
Yes, if we restart it, we
might be able to weaken Void.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0150
rows.name: We don't know what will actually happen, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0155
rows.name: it is worth a try.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0160
rows.name: I'm activating it. Be prepared for anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0170
rows.name: Mo-mo-mo! I-It's shaking, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0180
rows.name: E-Elma-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200110_MSG0190
rows.name: We're pulling back. Hurry![ST:wait ]
